query:
UPDATE workspace_settings
        SET git_sync = jsonb_set(
            git_sync,
            '{repositories}',
            (SELECT jsonb_agg(
                CASE WHEN elem->>'git_repo_resource_path' = $2
                    THEN jsonb_set(
                            jsonb_set(
                                jsonb_set(elem, '{auto_pull}',
                                          COALESCE(elem->'auto_pull', '{"enabled": false}'::jsonb), true),
                                '{auto_pull,last_synced_sha}', $3, true),
                            '{auto_pull,last_pull_status}', $4, true)
                    ELSE elem END)
             FROM jsonb_array_elements(git_sync->'repositories') AS elem)
        )
        WHERE workspace_id = $1
